root_text.an4.83:1.1: “Catūhi, bhikkhave, dhammehi samannāgato yathābhataṁ nikkhitto evaṁ niraye.
root_text.an4.83:1.5: ananuvicca apariyogāhetvā appasādanīye ṭhāne pasādaṁ upadaṁseti, ananuvicca apariyogāhetvā pasādanīye ṭhāne appasādaṁ upadaṁseti—
root_text.an4.83:1.6: imehi kho, bhikkhave, catūhi dhammehi samannāgato yathābhataṁ nikkhitto evaṁ niraye.
root_text.an4.83:2.1: Catūhi, bhikkhave, dhammehi samannāgato yathābhataṁ nikkhitto evaṁ sagge.
root_text.an4.83:2.5: anuvicca pariyogāhetvā appasādanīye ṭhāne appasādaṁ upadaṁseti
root_text.an4.83:2.6: anuvicca pariyogāhetvā pasādanīye ṭhāne pasādaṁ upadaṁseti—
root_text.an4.83:2.7: imehi kho, bhikkhave, catūhi dhammehi samannāgato yathābhataṁ nikkhitto evaṁ sagge”ti.

translation_text.an4.83:1.1: “Mendicants, someone with four qualities is placed in hell as if delivered there.
translation_text.an4.83:1.3: Without examining or scrutinizing, they praise those deserving of criticism,
translation_text.an4.83:1.4: and they criticize those deserving of praise.
translation_text.an4.83:1.5: They arouse faith in things that are dubious, and they don’t arouse faith in things that are inspiring.
translation_text.an4.83:1.6: Someone with these four qualities is placed in hell as if delivered there.
translation_text.an4.83:2.1: Someone with four qualities is placed in heaven as if delivered there.
translation_text.an4.83:2.3: After examining and scrutinizing, they criticize those deserving of criticism,
translation_text.an4.83:2.4: and they praise those deserving of praise.
translation_text.an4.83:2.5: They don’t arouse faith in things that are dubious,
translation_text.an4.83:2.6: and they do arouse faith in things that are inspiring.
translation_text.an4.83:2.7: Someone with these four qualities is placed in heaven as if delivered there.”
